mapper.select: SELECT id, dict_type, dict_value, dict_label, el_type, description, enable_flag, sort, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, remark, version FROM mdm_dict_item WHERE deleted = 0 AND dict_type = #{dictType} ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC

SELECT d.dict_type, d.description type_description, di.dict_value, di.dict_label, di.el_type, di.description, di.enable_flag FROM mdm_dict d INNER JOIN mdm_dict_item di ON di.dict_type = d.dict_type WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND di.deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.id, di.sort
SELECT dict_type, dict_label, dict_value, el_type, description, enable_flag FROM mdm_dict_item WHERE deleted = 0 AND dict_type IN ( #{item} ) ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT dict_type, dict_value, dict_label, enable_flag FROM mdm_dict_item WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort, id

SELECT dict_type, dict_value, dict_label, el_type, description, enable_flag, sort, remark FROM mdm_dict_item WHERE deleted = 0 AND dict_type = #{dictType}
AND dict_type IN ( #{item} )

SELECT * FROM mdm_dict_item WHERE deleted = 0 AND dict_type = #{dictType}
AND dict_type IN ( #{item} )
